description: Whether to enable the git-mcp MCP server.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.git-mcp.enable

description: Extra environment variables (escape hatch for options not yet in settings). Values end up in the Nix store -- use credentials for secrets.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.git-mcp.env

description: Host/address to bind for the HTTP service.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.git-mcp.service.host

description: Port to bind for the HTTP service.
type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.git-mcp.service.port

description: Git repository path. When set, restricts all operations to this path. When unset, the server accepts any repo path via tool arguments and discovers repos from MCP client roots.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.git-mcp.settings.repository

description: Extra CLI arguments (escape hatch for options not yet in settings).
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.args

description: Whether to enable the github-mcp MCP server.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.enable

description: Extra environment variables (escape hatch for options not yet in settings). Values end up in the Nix store -- use credentials for secrets.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.env

description: Host/address to bind for the HTTP service.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.service.host

description: Port to bind for the HTTP service.
type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.service.port

description: Credential mapped to GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN. Set exactly one of file or helper.
type: null or attribute-tagged union with choices: file, helper
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.credentials

description: Path to a file containing the raw secret value, read at runtime. Not stored in the Nix store. Works with sops-nix, agenix, or any tool that decrypts secrets to files. Mapped to GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.credentials.file

description: Path to an executable that outputs the raw secret value on stdout. Executed at service start. Mapped to GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.credentials.helper

description: Enable dynamic toolsets discovery. When false (default), all tools from configured toolsets are available at startup. When true, only meta-tools are advertised initially and toolsets must be enabled at runtime — requires client support for tools/list_changed notifications.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.dynamicToolsets

description: Tool names to forcibly disable regardless of other settings.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.excludeTools

description: GitHub hostname for GHE Server or data residency (e.g. https://ghes.example.com). Defaults to public github.com when unset.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.ghHost

description: Filter public repository content by push access. Only shows repos the token can push to.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.lockdownMode

description: Cache duration for repository access checks (e.g. "5m", "1h"). Server default is used when unset.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.repoAccessCacheTtl

description: Individual tool names to enable (additive with toolsets).
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.tools

description: Toolset groups to enable. Each group activates a related set of tools.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.github-mcp.settings.toolsets

description: Host/address to bind for the HTTP service.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.service.host

description: Port to bind for the HTTP service.
type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.service.port

description: Number of cache segments. Auto-detected by tier when null.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.cacheSegments

description: Credential mapped to OM_API_KEY. Set exactly one of file or helper.
type: null or attribute-tagged union with choices: file, helper
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.credentials

description: Path to a file containing the raw secret value, read at runtime. Not stored in the Nix store. Works with sops-nix, agenix, or any tool that decrypts secrets to files. Mapped to OM_API_KEY.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.credentials.file

description: Path to an executable that outputs the raw secret value on stdout. Executed at service start. Mapped to OM_API_KEY.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.credentials.helper

description: Sleep interval between decay operations in milliseconds. Default: 200.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.decay.sleepMs

description: Delay between embedding requests in milliseconds. Default: 200.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.embedDelayMs

description: Fallback embedding strategy when primary fails. Default: synthetic.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.embedFallback

default: { synthetic = { }; }
type: attribute-tagged union with choices: aws, gemini, local, ollama, openai, synthetic
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.embeddings

description: Allowed CORS origins for IDE mode. Default: localhost:5173, localhost:3000.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.ideAllowedOrigins

description: Maximum active memory items. Auto-detected by tier when null.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.maxActive

description: Maximum allowed vector dimension. Auto-detected by tier when null.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.maxVectorDim

default: { sqlite = { }; }
description: Metadata storage backend. Set exactly one of sqlite or postgres.
type: attribute-tagged union with choices: postgres, sqlite
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.metadataBackend

description: PostgreSQL password. Prefer credentials option for secrets.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.metadataBackend.postgres.password

type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.metadataBackend.postgres.port

description: PostgreSQL user. Defaults to current system user.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.metadataBackend.postgres.user

description: Credential mapped to OPENAI_API_KEY. Set exactly one of file or helper.
type: null or attribute-tagged union with choices: file, helper
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.openaiCredentials

description: Path to a file containing the raw secret value, read at runtime. Not stored in the Nix store. Works with sops-nix, agenix, or any tool that decrypts secrets to files. Mapped to OPENAI_API_KEY.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.openaiCredentials.file

description: Path to an executable that outputs the raw secret value on stdout. Executed at service start. Mapped to OPENAI_API_KEY.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.openaiCredentials.helper

description: HTTP endpoint path. Only used in HTTP mode.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.path

description: Reflection interval (number of operations between reflections). Default: 10.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.reflection.interval

description: Minimum memories required before reflection triggers. Default: 20.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.reflection.minMemories

type: null or integer between 1 and 3 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.summaryLayers

description: Performance tier. Affects defaults for vector dimensions, cache segments, and active memory limits.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.tier

description: Use only summary for reflection instead of full content.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.useSummaryOnly

description: Vector dimension. Must match the embedding model (e.g., 768 for nomic-embed-text). Auto-detected by tier when null.
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.vecDim

default: { sqlite = { }; }
description: Vector storage backend. Set exactly one of sqlite, postgres, or valkey.
type: attribute-tagged union with choices: postgres, sqlite, valkey
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.vectorBackend

type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
name: services.mcp-servers.servers.openmemory-mcp.settings.vectorBackend.valkey.port

description: Tool names exposed by each enabled server (from upstream metadata). Use this to build client-specific auto-approval configs by filtering and formatting with standard Nix functions.
type: attribute set of list of string
name: services.mcp-servers.tools

description: Whether to enable stacked workflow git config presets (skills/instructions/refs live in the devenv module — project-local scope).
name: stacked-workflows.enable

description:
Git configuration preset for stacked workflows.

  • "minimal" -- required + strongly recommended settings
  • "full" -- all recommended settings (branchless, revise, general git)
  • "none" -- no git configuration changes

All values are set at mkDefault priority so you can override individual keys at normal priority in programs.git.settings.
name: stacked-workflows.gitPreset
